name: flash-guard
description: Offline fintech apps, API, and DB for QE students.

scripts.stack:up: npm run stack:up:containers && npm --prefix mobile run start
scripts.test:api: npx newman run tests/api/flash-guard.postman_collection.json -e tests/api/flash-guard-environment.json --reporters cli,html --reporter-html-export reports/newman.html
scripts.test:mobile: echo "Students run Android emulator automation against http://10.0.2.2:4000"
scripts.test:e2e: echo "Students run cross-layer E2E and DB validations"
scripts.test:all: npm run test:install-browsers && npm run test:web && npm run test:api && npm run verify:db
